functions.name: aea_cli_ipfs.registry.validate_registry
documentation:
Validate local registry data.

```
param registry_data

json like object containing registry data.
```

functions.name: aea_cli_ipfs.registry.write_local_registry
documentation:
Write registry data to file.

```
param registry_data

json like object containing registry data.

param registry_path

local registry path.
```

functions.name: aea_cli_ipfs.registry.load_local_registry
documentation: Returns local registry data.

documentation: Get IPFS hash from local registry.

functions.name: aea_cli_ipfs.registry.register_item_to_local_registry
documentation:
Add PublicId to hash mapping in the local registry.

```
param item_type

item type.

param public_id

public id of package.

param package_hash

hash of package.

param registry_path

local registry path.
```

documentation: Fetch a package from IPFS node.

documentation: Tear down command group.

documentation: Add directory to ipfs, if not directory specified the current one will be added.

documentation: Remove a directory from ipfs by it's hash.

functions.name: aea_cli_ipfs.core.download
documentation: Download directory by it's hash, if not target directory specified will use current one.

documentation:
Returns the file path for item config file.

```
param dir_path

directory path.

return

package path and item type.
```

functions.name: aea_cli_ipfs.core.register_package
documentation:
Register package to IPFS registry.

```
param ipfs_tool

instance of IPFSTool.

param dir_path

package directory.

param no_pin

pin object or not.

return

package hash
```

raises Exception

Init tool.

multiaddr string for IPFS client.

API base for IPFS client.

documentation: Node address

documentation: Checks if a package with `package_hash` is pinned or not

documentation: Returns a list of all pins.

methods.name: aea_cli_ipfs.ipfs_utils.IPFSTool.add_bytes
documentation:
Add bytes data to ipfs.

```
param data

bytes

param kwargs

options passed to request library

return

hash
```

methods.name: aea_cli_ipfs.ipfs_utils.IPFSTool.add
documentation:
Add directory to ipfs.

It wraps into directory.

```
param dir_path

str, path to dir to publish

param pin

bool, pin object or not

param recursive

bool, publish dierctory recursively or not

param wrap_with_directory

bool, wrap object with directory or not

return

dir name published, hash, list of items processed
```

methods.name: aea_cli_ipfs.ipfs_utils.IPFSTool.pin
documentation: Pin content with hash_id

methods.name: aea_cli_ipfs.ipfs_utils.IPFSTool.remove
documentation:
Remove dir added by it's hash.

```
param hash_id

str. hash of dir to remove

return

dict with unlinked items.
```

methods.name: aea_cli_ipfs.ipfs_utils.IPFSTool.remove_unpinned_files
documentation: Remove dir added by it's hash.

methods.name: aea_cli_ipfs.ipfs_utils.IPFSTool.download
documentation:
Download dir by its hash.

```
param hash_id

str. hash of file or package to download

param target_dir

Union[str, Path]. directory to place downloaded

param fix_path

bool. default True. on download don't wrap result in to hash_id directory.

param attempts

int. default 5. How often to attempt the download.

return

downloaded path
```

methods.name: aea_cli_ipfs.ipfs_utils.IPFSTool.publish
documentation:
Publish directory by it's hash id.

```
param hash_id

hash of the directory to publish.

return

dict of names it was publish for.
```

methods.name: aea_cli_ipfs.ipfs_utils.IPFSTool.check_ipfs_node_running
documentation: Check ipfs node running.
IPFS tool to add, publish, remove, download directories.
